---
title: "STA207_Final"
author: "Akshaj Joshi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(haven)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)


students_data <- read_sav("/Users/akshajjoshi/Downloads/dataverse_files/STAR_Students.sav")
k3_data <- read_sav("/Users/akshajjoshi/Downloads/dataverse_files/STAR_K-3_Schools.sav")
hs_data <- read_sav("/Users/akshajjoshi/Downloads/dataverse_files/STAR_High_Schools.sav")

```



```{r}
colnames(students_data)
```

```{r}
attributes(students_data$gkfreelunch)
```


### Drop NA values for class assignment
```{r}
library(haven)

students_clean <- students_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(gkclasstype)) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.labelled), as_factor))
```

### Baseline Table to check balanced factors in each class type
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)

balance_table <- students_clean %>%
  group_by(gkclasstype) %>%
  summarise(
    Students = n(),
    Female = mean(gender == levels(gender)[2], na.rm = TRUE),
    Free_Lunch = mean(gkfreelunch == levels(gkfreelunch)[2], na.rm = TRUE)
  )

race_balance <- students_clean %>%
  count(gkclasstype, race) %>%
  group_by(gkclasstype) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  select(-n) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = race, values_from = prop)

final_balance <- balance_table %>%
  left_join(race_balance, by = "gkclasstype")

kable(final_balance,
      caption = "Baseline Characteristics by Class Type")
```


### Grade 3 Math and Reading Score Intervals
```{r}
scores_long <- students_clean %>%
  select(gkclasstype, g3treadss, g3tmathss) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(g3treadss, g3tmathss),
    names_to = "subject",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    subject = recode(subject,
                     g3treadss = "Reading",
                     g3tmathss = "Math")
  )

ggplot(scores_long, aes(x = gkclasstype, y = score, fill = subject)) +
  geom_boxplot(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Grade 3 Reading and Math Scores by Class Type",
    x = "Class Type",
    y = "Test Score",
    fill = "Subject"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

### High School GPA Distribution
```{r}
ggplot(students_clean %>% filter(!is.na(hsgpaoverall)),
       aes(x = hsgpaoverall)) +
  geom_histogram(fill = "steelblue", bins = 30) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of High School GPA",
    x = "High School GPA (0–100 scale)",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```



```{r}
ggplot(students_clean,
       aes(x = gkclasstype, y = g3treadss, color = gkfreelunch)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", aes(group = gkfreelunch)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point") +
  labs(
    title = "Interaction Between Class Type and Free Lunch Status",
    x = "Class Type",
    y = "Average Reading Score",
    color = "Free Lunch"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(students_clean,
       aes(x = gkclasstype, y = g3tmathss, color = gkfreelunch)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", aes(group = gkfreelunch), size = 1) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Interaction Between Class Type and Free Lunch Status (Math Scores)",
    x = "Kindergarten Class Type",
    y = "Average Grade 3 Math Score",
    color = "Free Lunch Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(students_clean %>% filter(!is.na(hsgpaoverall)),
       aes(x = g3treadss, y = hsgpaoverall)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Grade 3 Reading Scores vs High School GPA",
    x = "Grade 3 Reading Score",
    y = "High School GPA"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

math_long <- students_clean %>%
  select(gkclasstype, gkfreelunch,
         gktmathss, g1tmathss, g2tmathss, g3tmathss) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(gktmathss, g1tmathss, g2tmathss, g3tmathss),
    names_to = "grade",
    values_to = "math_score"
  )

math_long$grade <- recode(math_long$grade,
  gktmathss = "Kindergarten",
  g1tmathss = "Grade 1",
  g2tmathss = "Grade 2",
  g3tmathss = "Grade 3"
)

ggplot(math_long,
       aes(x = gkclasstype, y = math_score, fill = gkclasstype)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ grade) +
  labs(
    title = "Math Score Distributions by Class Type Across Grades K–3",
    x = "Kindergarten Class Type",
    y = "Math Score",
    fill = "Class Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```

```{r}
table(students_clean$gkthighdegree)
```



```{r}
students_exp <- students_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(g3tmathss),
         !is.na(gkclasstype),
         !is.na(gktyears),
         gkthighdegree == 'MASTERS') %>%   # keep only degree level 2
  mutate(exp_group = cut(
    gktyears,
    breaks = c(0,5,10,15,20,Inf),
    labels = c("0–5","6–10","11–15","16–20","20+")
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(exp_group))

ggplot(students_exp,
       aes(x = g3tmathss, fill = gkclasstype)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~ exp_group) +
  labs(
    title = "Grade 3 Math Score Distributions by Teacher Experience (Degree Level 2)",
    x = "Grade 3 Math Score",
    y = "Density",
    fill = "Class Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

### SES Plots
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

scores_long <- students_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(g3tmathss),
         !is.na(g3treadss),
         !is.na(gkclasstype),
         !is.na(gkfreelunch)) %>%
  select(gkclasstype, gkfreelunch, g3tmathss, g3treadss) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(g3tmathss, g3treadss),
    names_to = "subject",
    values_to = "score"
  )

scores_long$subject <- recode(scores_long$subject,
  g3tmathss = "Math",
  g3treadss = "Reading"
)

ggplot(scores_long,
       aes(x = gkclasstype,
           y = score,
           fill = factor(gkfreelunch))) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ subject) +
  labs(
    title = "Grade 3 Achievement by Class Type and SES",
    x = "Kindergarten Class Type",
    y = "Average Score",
    fill = "SES"
  ) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = c("Free Lunch", "Non-Free Lunch")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

## GAP of SES
```{r}
gap_data <- scores_long %>%
  group_by(subject, gkclasstype, gkfreelunch) %>%
  summarise(mean_score = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = gkfreelunch, values_from = mean_score) %>%
  mutate(gap = `NON-FREE LUNCH` - `FREE LUNCH`)

ggplot(gap_data,
       aes(x = gkclasstype, y = gap, fill = gkclasstype)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~ subject) +
  labs(
    title = "SES Achievement Gap by Class Type",
    x = "Kindergarten Class Type",
    y = "Score Gap (Non-Free Lunch − Free Lunch)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```


```{r}
names(students_clean)[grepl("^hs", names(students_clean))]
```

```{r}
ggplot(students_clean,
       aes(x = g3tmathss, y = hsgpaoverall, color = gkclasstype)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Grade 3 Math Scores and High School GPA",
    x = "Grade 3 Math Score",
    y = "High School GPA",
    color = "Class Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

### Check equal class size
```{r}
teacher_data <- students_clean %>%
  select(gktchid, gkclasstype, gktyears) %>%
  distinct()

teacher_data %>%
  group_by(gkclasstype) %>%
  summarise(
    Teachers = n(),
    Mean_Experience = round(mean(gktyears, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD_Experience = round(sd(gktyears, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
  )


```

### Fade out vs accumulation
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

math_long <- students_clean %>%
  select(gkclasstype, gktmathss, g1tmathss, g2tmathss, g3tmathss) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(gktmathss, g1tmathss, g2tmathss, g3tmathss),
    names_to = "grade",
    values_to = "score"
  )

math_long$grade <- recode(math_long$grade,
  gktmathss = "K",
  g1tmathss = "1",
  g2tmathss = "2",
  g3tmathss = "3"
)

math_long$grade <- factor(math_long$grade,
                          levels = c("K","1","2","3"))

ggplot(math_long,
       aes(x = grade, y = score,
           color = gkclasstype,
           group = gkclasstype)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Math Achievement Trajectories by Class Type (K–3)",
    x = "Grade",
    y = "Average Math Score",
    color = "Class Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


### Class-size treatment effect over time
```{r}
effect_data <- math_long %>%
  group_by(grade, gkclasstype) %>%
  summarise(mean_score = mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = gkclasstype, values_from = mean_score) %>%
  mutate(effect = `SMALL CLASS` - `REGULAR CLASS`)

ggplot(effect_data,
       aes(x = grade, y = effect, group = 1)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Evolution of the Class Size Effect Across Grades",
    x = "Grade",
    y = "Small Class Advantage (Score Difference)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

gain_data <- students_clean %>%
  mutate(
    gain_K1 = g1tmathss - gktmathss,
    gain_12 = g2tmathss - g1tmathss,
    gain_23 = g3tmathss - g2tmathss
  ) %>%
  select(gkclasstype, gain_K1, gain_12, gain_23) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("gain"),
    names_to = "grade_gain",
    values_to = "gain"
  )

# Rename transitions
gain_data$grade_gain <- recode(gain_data$grade_gain,
  gain_K1 = "K → 1",
  gain_12 = "1 → 2",
  gain_23 = "2 → 3"
)

# Set correct order
gain_data$grade_gain <- factor(
  gain_data$grade_gain,
  levels = c("K → 1", "1 → 2", "2 → 3")
)

ggplot(gain_data,
       aes(x = grade_gain,
           y = gain,
           color = gkclasstype,
           group = gkclasstype)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Learning Gains by Class Type Across Grades",
    x = "Grade Transition",
    y = "Average Math Score Gain",
    color = "Class Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
